_doc: Drawn-wall log. The DrawWallSystem spawns one of these per LOG_SPACING (0.30u) along the player's drawn polyline so a curved drag yields a curved wall. Each log is its own ECS entity with Health + circular Collider; the 'wall' Tag plugs into HeroAI's DEFEND_WALL behavior. HP-per-log ~= 8 ⇒ ~25 HP per unit-length given 0.30u spacing — total wall HP scales naturally with the number of logs (= length / spacing).
